extensionIdPlaceholder: Enter Chrome or Firefox Extension ID
pairingKeyDesc: This key has been copied to your clipboard. Paste this key into the Extension configuration.
pairingKeyMaskDesc: The key is masked by default. Click the eye icon to view or click copy to paste into your browser extensions.
minimizeToTrayLabel: Minimize to system tray on close
minimizeToTrayDesc: If disabled, closing the window will exit the program completely.
autostartDesc: Start Secure Vault Manager automatically in the system tray when you log into your computer.
extensionPairingDesc: The pairing key connects the Desktop app with browser extensions. This key remains constant unless you explicitly regenerate a new key.
chromeIdRequired: Please enter the Chrome Extension ID.
importDataDesc: Support 1Password export (.1pux), JSON, and CSV files.
exportDataDesc: Export vault items to JSON or CSV format.
